title: Tech Stack
description: Technology layers powering the Nessi marketplace — frontend, state management, backend, infrastructure, and code quality.

nodes.label: Next.js 16
nodes.tooltip: Full-stack React framework with file-system routing, server components, and proxy.ts middleware.

nodes.label: React 19
nodes.tooltip: UI component library with hooks, server components, and concurrent features.

nodes.label: SCSS Modules
nodes.tooltip: Scoped CSS with Nessi design tokens, dark theme, and frosted glass effects.

nodes.label: react-icons
nodes.tooltip: Icon library providing HiOutline and other icon sets across the UI.

nodes.label: next/image
nodes.tooltip: Automatic image optimization with lazy loading and responsive sizing.

nodes.label: Tanstack Query
nodes.tooltip: Data fetching and caching with useQuery/useMutation. QueryCache handles 403 context revocation.

nodes.label: Zustand
nodes.tooltip: Lightweight stores with createSelectors pattern (useStore.use.*()). Used for edit wizards, create wizards, and context switching.

nodes.label: AuthProvider
nodes.tooltip: React context providing authenticated Supabase client and user session to the component tree.

nodes.label: Supabase Auth
nodes.tooltip: Authentication via @supabase/ssr with cookie-based session management. Supports email/password signup.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.tooltip: Relational database with Row Level Security on all tables. Managed by Supabase with migrations in supabase/migrations/.

nodes.label: Supabase Storage
nodes.tooltip: Object storage with two buckets: listing-images (product photos + thumbnails) and profile-assets (avatars, shop banners).

nodes.label: Vercel
nodes.tooltip: Hosting platform with automatic deployments from GitHub, edge CDN, and serverless functions.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions
nodes.tooltip: Continuous integration running format check, lint, typecheck, tests, and build on every push.

nodes.label: Vercel Analytics
nodes.tooltip: First-party web analytics integrated via @vercel/analytics in the root layout.

nodes.label: Speed Insights
nodes.tooltip: Real user performance monitoring via @vercel/speed-insights in the root layout.

nodes.label: ESLint
nodes.tooltip: Linting with Next.js core-web-vitals and TypeScript configs.

nodes.label: Prettier
nodes.tooltip: Code formatting with semi, singleQuote, trailingComma all configuration.

nodes.label: Stylelint
nodes.tooltip: SCSS linting with stylelint-config-standard-scss.

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.tooltip: Type safety with strict: true in tsconfig.json.

nodes.label: Vitest
nodes.tooltip: Unit and integration testing framework with setup file and workspace configuration.
